parts.text: I bought a delicious dinner for $35.50 today, please record it under Food.
Add a utility bill expense of $120.00 for June 2026. The bill note should say: customer email is test_user@gmail.com and phone is +1-555-0199.
Please analyze my spending history and give me useful advice for the incoming month.
Show my spending summary and remaining budget for June 2026.
Set my monthly budget to $2000 for June 2026.
Please delete the expense with transaction ID 45.
Show my spending summary for May 2026.
I set a budget of $500 for Shopping but I already spent $650. What is my status?
